song.title: For the Honor
song.lyrics: [V1] For the honor the Father who reaches out to us That we might live inside His love, He gave His only Son [V2] For the honor of the Savior, let the cross be lifted high The great exchange of love and grace, came down to give us life [V3] For the honor of the Spirit whose power lives in us That we might see much greater things as we embrace Your love [V4] For the honor of Your kingdom whose reign will never end We'll give our lives in sacrifice until You come again [B] Forever, forever We'll honor You forever
song.author: Elevation Worship
